message:
fix(checkpoint): preserve delta chain parents during pruning + misc fixes

checkpoint.ts:
- Prevent pruneCheckpoints from deleting checkpoints that are parents
  of other checkpoints (would corrupt delta chains)
- Query for parentCheckpointId references before deletion
- Filter candidates to only delete orphaned checkpoints
- Add structured logging with skippedDeltaParents count

auto-checkpoint.service.ts:
- Call .unref() on interval timer to prevent blocking process exit
- Allows graceful shutdown even with active checkpoint timer

context-health.service.ts:
- Fix division by zero when beforeTokens is 0
- Add guard: beforeTokens > 0 before computing reductionPercent

New test:
- websocket-context.test.tsx: Tests for WebSocket context provider

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
